context_text: <A> not at all i graduated from old miss and and but everybody in my husband's family went to a different out of state school / <B> yeah / <A> and uh one of them went to mississippi state here briefly but there i i just don't have any preference you know i just kinda like if they're from mississippi i'll pull for 'em since we're so abused you know { just } / <B> [ yeah ] / <A> let someone win / <B> yeah
